title: Is it worth it
wikitext:
[]: Is it worth it?             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:32 am So i just read a handful of threads about Rebuild and saw there is a lot of both negative and positive feed back... and a lot of negative. So i was wondering if any one could tell me if it is worth it to buy the 2.22 Blu ray from the hong kong release or should i just wait for it to come out in the states. Namely are there any differences in the two releases.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 12:15 pm Take your pick, you can get the Hong Kong version which has passable English subtitles for over $40, or you can wait... what... another year (?) for the domestic release which will have a better subtitle translation (as well as a dub) for about $10 less. Keep in mind, fansubs do exist. Just make sure you pick yup a legitimate release at some point so the creators are profiting from their effort. I was debating getting the Hong Kong version. But every time I consider it, I think "Now why would I do that, it's not like I can't just watch my fansub between now and the domestic release".

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Oct 14, 2010 1:03 pm Or the german blu-ray for 21€... http://www.amazon.de/Evangelion-2-22--You-advance-Blu-ray/dp/B00377IRUS/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1287079394&sr=8-1

[]: Re: Is it worth it?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 1:13 pm qu4d wrote: Or the german blu-ray for 21€... http://www.amazon.de/Evangelion-2-22--You-advance-Blu-ray/dp/B00377IRUS/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1287079394&sr=8-1

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Oct 14, 2010 1:33 pm but it less than 40$ :P

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Thu Oct 14, 2010 1:35 pm well actually the german release would work for me as i am born and raised in germany so it would be just as good for me Keep in mind, fansubs do exist. Just make sure you pick yup a legitimate release at some point so the creators are profiting from their effort.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Oct 14, 2010 1:39 pm Animejunkie wrote: well actually the german release would work for me as i am born and raised in germany so it would be just as good for me

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 2:09 pm Animejunkie wrote: also could u point me in the direction of one of these fan subs as i cannot seem to find one...

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Oct 14, 2010 2:57 pm ^ I thought that piracy was against the rules. I own the german blu-ray of 2.22 too. The german subtitles are surprisingly gut.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 14, 2010 3:16 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: ^ I thought that piracy was against the rules.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Thu Oct 14, 2010 5:58 pm just as a side note i do plan on purchasing it reguardless when it comes to america... ive already just ordered my 1.11 on blu ray and wanted to know if i should wait to get, or just get 2.22 now. I own the german blu-ray of 2.22 too. The german subtitles are surprisingly gut.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Oct 14, 2010 6:25 pm Animejunkie wrote: just as a side note i do plan on purchasing it reguardless when it comes to america... ive already just ordered my 1.11 on blu ray and wanted to know if i should wait to get, or just get 2.22 now. is it only subtitles or does it have a german dub to it? i mean either way its fine id just rather listen to it in german if i can... and i know german wont be on the american release as an audio option.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:26 pm Animejunkie wrote: is it only subtitles or does it have a german dub to it? i mean either way its fine id just rather listen to it in german if i can... and i know german wont be on the american release as an audio option.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Fri Oct 15, 2010 2:38 pm i should be able to play it as most of my electronics come directly from germany so i really dont think thats gonna be a problem

[]: Re: Is it worth it?             Quote Post by Jinroh » Fri Oct 15, 2010 2:59 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It doesn't have English subtitles, and it's not in the same region.

[]: Re: Is it worth it?             Quote Post by insomniac » Fri Oct 15, 2010 9:17 pm Jinroh wrote: Region is not an issue. BR are nearly never region locked.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Oct 16, 2010 11:26 am German dub of 2.22: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iVoIaZ4ZLuI I fell off my seat when I heard Misato speaking. The german dub is pretty bad.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Oct 16, 2010 11:28 am Bad? It´s actually pretty good.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Oct 16, 2010 12:46 pm qu4d wrote: Bad? It´s actually pretty good.

[]: Re: Is it worth it?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Oct 16, 2010 1:10 pm Jinroh wrote: Region is not an issue. BR are nearly never region locked.
